3134010.name: Where Is Granma!?
3134010.description:
Single-player third-person shooter that takes you through various levels infested with mutant vegetables each one has unique abilities and attacks, and you'll also have to fight bosses to complete each level.

The game takes place on a farm, on a road filled with enemies and obstacles, and in a small town at night.

Weapons include a large cooking spoon that you can use as a melee weapon, a pistol, a machine gun, and bombs.

In some places to obtain ammunition, you'll have to destroy large red ants to obtain bullets for the pistol, and much larger black ants for the machine gun.

You will play as a grandmother who is left behind alone and trapped on a farm full of vegetables mutated into giant insects.

Your granddaughter Sofia leaves you a message that lets you know that in the nearest town there is a helicopter that you can use to escape.

However, to get to the town, you must travel along a very bumpy road full of mutants.

The creatures are immune to conventional weapons, but vulnerable to salt and pepper.

Fortunately, your granddaughter Sofia made a saltshaker gun that throws salt cubes and an automatic pepper shaker that throws peppercorns and some special bombs with species.
3134010.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
